chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D-508 of 2022 Date Order with signature of Judge(s) For order as to maintainability 21.8.2025 None present for the petitioner -------------------------------- This is an old case of 2022, which is over three years ago. On 28.1.2022, learned counsel for the petitioner was directed to satisfy this Court about the maintainability of this petition. On 17.2.2022, a counsel held brief for learned counsel for the petitioner. Despite lapse of three years, learned counsel for the petitioner has not made any serious efforts to have this petition fixed for hearing. The question of maintainability still remains unresolved. Today, none present for the petitioner without intimation. It appears that the petitioner has lost interest in pursuing this old petition, which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution alongwith pending application(s). HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Zahid/*
